_meta.title: SARFAESI recovery statistics
_meta.source: RBI 'Report on Trend and Progress of Banking in India' (recovery-by-channel table). Values below filled from SECONDARY reporting — see policy.
_meta.summary: SARFAESI volumes and recovery rate. SARFAESI requires a secured asset, so it is largely OUTSIDE the sub-₹1 lakh unsecured segment — recorded as cross-channel context only.
_meta.policy: PRIMARY = RBI 'Report on Trend and Progress of Banking in India' recovery-by-channel table, exact year. Recorded values are from SECONDARY reporting (June 2026 web search) → confidence:medium + TODO_VERIFY. Never fabricate. SARFAESI is context, not core.
